stub: He is a Labour MP who comes from a white working class background.
personalization: He tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of his party, even when that conflicts with the wishes of his constituents.
substantive: He opposes adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration.
justification: In political debates, he regularly explains how his policies matter to people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background).
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, he said: “I can only change society if I am re-elected. So, I always make sure that I listen to voters’ most important concerns.”
text: He is a Labour MP who comes from a white working class background. He is from your constituency. He tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of his party, even when that conflicts with the wishes of his constituents. He opposes adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration. In political debates, he regularly explains how his policies matter to people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background). Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, he said: “I can only change society if I am re-elected. So, I always make sure that I listen to voters’ most important concerns.”
